outputs_written.text: Over its five-year trajectory of measurable impact [fact_756], AlphaFold has transitioned from a specialized protein-folding utility into a comprehensive biomolecular modeling platform. While AlphaFold 2 established foundational applications across biology and medicine [fact_755], AlphaFold 3 represents a critical architectural evolution that merges legacy frameworks with generative AI.
